mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate remains near zero while inflation (CPIAUCSL) accelerates above 2.5% year-over-year, creating negative real rates that incentivize equity allocation and reduce discount rates on future corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
regime_hint: post-pandemic recovery with accommodative monetary policy and rising inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances when trigger condition is met, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate declines below 5.5% while payroll employment (PAYEMS) grows month-over-month, signaling robust labor market recovery that increases consumer purchasing power and corporate earnings expectations, producing positive equity returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE < 5.5% AND PAYEMS monthly change > 200 thousand
evidence_refs: fact:May 2021 UNRATE at 5.0%, PAYEMS at 142654 thousand
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with accelerating employment recovery
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not significantly positive (mean return < 0.5%) when both conditions are met, or Sharpe ratio of the signal < 0.3 over any 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) exceed 1.2 million units annualized, indicating strong residential construction demand that signals broad economic confidence and multiplier effects through employment and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between HOUST and 20-day forward returns is below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or correlation becomes negative in more than 40% of rolling 6-month periods.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) decelerates month-over-month while remaining above trend, indicating supply-side constraints that compress profit margins and reduce forward earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days as investors reprrice earnings expectations downward.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO monthly change < 0.3% AND INDPRO level > 106.5
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal produces negative Sharpe ratio over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales (RSAFS) growth decelerates below 0.5% month-over-month while unemployment remains elevated above 5.0%, signaling weakening consumer demand that reduces corporate revenue expectations and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:May 2021 RSAFS at 447255 million, UNRATE at 5.0%
regime_hint: early-cycle recovery with fragile consumer momentum
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 58% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate remains at or near zero while real GDP growth (GDPC1) accelerates above 4% annualized, creating a regime where monetary policy lags economic growth and inflation expectations rise, compressing equity risk premiums and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25% AND GDPC1 quarterly growth > 4.0% annualized
evidence_refs: fact:May 2021 FEDFUNDS at 0.12%, GDPC1 at 16394.2 billion
regime_hint: monetary accommodation during strong recovery expansion
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not significantly positive (mean < 0.8%) when both conditions are met, or the signal produces negative Sharpe ratio over any 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rises more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month period while payroll employment growth turns negative, signaling labor market deterioration that reduces consumer confidence and corporate hiring expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change > 0.3pp AND PAYEMS monthly change < 0
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 62% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict negative returns with directional accuracy > 55% over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) accelerates above 1.0% month-over-month while remaining below 108.0, indicating supply-side expansion that supports margin recovery and earnings growth without triggering inflation concerns, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO momentum and 5-day forward returns is below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or correlation becomes negative in more than 45% of rolling 3-month periods.
